name: @nshiab/journalism-geo
description: Useful TypeScript functions for journalism projects. This library focuses on wrangling geospatial data.

tasks.all-tests: deno install && deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check src/index.ts && deno doc --lint src/index.ts && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && TZ=America/Toronto deno test -A --fail-fast && deno task llm
tasks.llm: deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/deno-docs-to-md && deno fmt llm.md
tasks.patch: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version patch
tasks.minor: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version minor
tasks.major: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version major
